what: Display the vault detail page: sub-header with vault name and actions, left knowledge sidebar, and main content area
why: Provides the full vault detail UX: category tree for navigation, knowledge detail panel for viewing/editing entries

layout.sub_header: Back arrow + vault name + 'Link Projects' button + 'Vault Settings' button
layout.left_sidebar: Create / Import / Export / Search toolbar + CategoryTree (collapsible by category; each entry shows compact metadata: tag icon + count, code icon + rules count if any, link icon + required_knowledge count if any)
layout.main_content: KnowledgeDetailPanel when entry selected, placeholder text when not

success_handling.criteria: Vault detail page renders with sidebar and placeholder or selected entry

decisions.reason: Move from inline tree overlay to full vault detail page
decisions.rationale: Clicking a vault card now navigates to /vaults/:id; the full page gives more room for the sidebar + knowledge detail panel

decisions.reason: Embed knowledge sidebar inside vault detail rather than ContextualSidebar
decisions.rationale: Vault context is URL-driven; the global ContextualSidebar is reserved for project context only
